ISocketAdapter Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Adapter for a web socket.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Socket
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface ISocketAdapter

The ISocketAdapter type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
OnCloseAsync
Called when the socket is closed.
OnMessageReceivedAsync
Called when the server received a message from the client.
OnReceiveError
Called when an error has occurred.
